title: Create separate Dev and Prod environments?
excerpt: Hi - I’m brand new to Monday.  I have a consultant helping us develop some new flows.  To really put the new system through its paces, I’d like to load the system with real world data.  However there is sensitive data in…

posts.author: xrbbaker (Russell Bakker)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi - I’m brand new to Monday. I have a consultant helping us develop some new flows. To really put the new system through its paces, I’d like to load the system with real world data. However there is sensitive data in there that I can’t have someone outside of our firm view. How do I set up a separate Dev environment for our consultant to work in, and have a Prod environment for real world data? Also, how then would I move boards, etc. from the Dev environment into the Prod environment? Are there best practices described somewhere in this forum? Thank you
